footer.tagline: Built for the Venus Protocol community

header.tagline: AI-powered DeFi automation for Venus Protocol
header.title: Venus Agent Skills

note.securityText: Your private key never leaves your machine. The agent executes transactions locally using your wallet.
note.warningText: This is a beta release. Use at your own risk. Only use test funds or small amounts. Always verify transactions before confirming.

installation.paragraph1: Installing Venus Agent Skills takes less than 5 minutes. Follow these steps:

1.text: <Bold>Download the skill package</Bold> from the <RepoLink>official repository</RepoLink>

2.text: <Bold>Place it in your agent's skills directory:</Bold>

3.text: <Bold>Configure your wallet credentials</Bold> in the .env file:

5.text: <Bold>Restart your agent</Bold> to load the new skill

installation.title: How to Install

1.description: Talk to your agent like a human, no technical jargon required
1.title: Natural Language Commands

2.description: Get live APY rates, liquidity, and market stats instantly
2.title: Real-time Market Data

3.description: AI analyzes your wallet and suggests optimal earning strategies
3.title: Smart Recommendations

4.description: Deposit, borrow, repay, and withdraw with simple commands
4.title: Transaction Automation

5.description: Set conditions like "deposit when APY > 3%" and let the agent work
5.title: Auto-trading Rules

6.description: Monitor your positions, health factor, and earnings 24/7
6.title: Portfolio Tracking

introduction.highlight: Perfect for both DeFi beginners and experienced traders who want to save time and optimize yields.
introduction.paragraph1: Venus Agent Skills is an AI-powered automation framework that allows you to interact with Venus Protocol using natural language. Instead of navigating complex DeFi interfaces, simply tell your AI agent what you want to do.
introduction.title: What is Venus Agent Skills?

dialog1.agentIntro: 🤖 Agent: "Yes! I have Venus Protocol skills installed. I can help you with:
dialog1.agentOutro: What would you like to do?"

capabilities.1: Checking market data and APY rates
capabilities.2: Analyzing your wallet and Venus positions

dialog1.user: 👤 You: "Do you have Venus skills installed?"

dialog2.agent: 🤖 Agent fetches live data from Venus Core Pool...
dialog2.user: 👤 "Show me the top 5 markets by liquidity"

dialog3.agent: 🤖 Agent checks your wallet and displays your supply, borrow, and health factor...
dialog3.user: 👤 "What's my current position on Venus Core/Flux?"

dialog4.agent: 🤖 Agent analyzes your wallet balance and recommends the best earning strategy...

verification.highlight: If the agent responds with market data or recommendations, congratulations! Venus Agent Skills is installed and ready to use. 🎉
verification.paragraph1: After installation, confirm that Venus Agent Skills is working correctly by chatting with your agent:
verification.paragraph2: Try these test commands to make sure everything works:

tip.label: 💡 Tip:
tip.text: Start with read-only commands (like checking markets) before executing transactions. This helps you get comfortable with the agent's capabilities.

verification.title: Verify Installation

modals.maturityDatePendleTooltip: The end date of this fixed-yield position (from Pendle). After this date, you get back the full original asset (principal). The locked fixed return stops here, good to hold until then for the planned yield.
modals.maturityPendleDisclaimer: Before maturity, the amount received upon withdrawal is subject to Pendle market prices. After maturity, withdrawals are redeemed 1:1 based on your PT token holdings.

overview.managerTooltip: The address or team that manages this underlying asset of this vault. Deposited assets are allocated to markets they oversee, and they may update redemption or settlement timelines based on market conditions.
overview.riskDisclosureText:
Pendle is a decentralised yield-trading protocol that enables fixed-rate yield through Principal Tokens (PTs). The Venus Fixed Rate Vault routes deposits through Pendle's infrastructure to acquire PTs, which are supplied to Venus Core as collateral.
While Pendle cannot access or move your deposited funds, using this vault exposes you to risks from both protocols. These include smart contract vulnerabilities, oracle failures, and the possibility of either protocol being exploited or paused. Early withdrawals are executed at market price and may return less than the amount deposited. Fixed APY is locked at deposit and does not protect against protocol-level failures.

lockingPeriod.label: Locking period
lockingPeriod.tooltip: The locking period is the delay between a withdrawal request and when the requested amount can actually be withdrawn from the vault.
